summary: Iteration 35 - Personal Sessions Style Control Panel Testing COMPLETE. All features verified successfully: Admin Page Headers tab contains redesigned 'PERSONAL SESSIONS — STYLE CONTROL' section with 5 visual areas (Hero Section, Body Content, Buttons, Calendar & Booking, Homepage Session List). Each area has preview labels. Titillium Web font available in ALL 35 font dropdowns. Coal Black and other presets work. Session detail page shows visible badges on purple hero with correct admin-controlled colors. Homepage 'View Details & Book' button uses admin button colors.
critical_code_review_comments: PageHeadersTab.jsx: Well-organized with 5 visual sections - Hero (purple bg), Body Content (white bg), Buttons (gray bg), Calendar (gray bg), Homepage List (purple bg)
FONT_OPTIONS constant at line 10-17 correctly includes Titillium Web
Session template section uses proper data-testid='session-template-section'
Each section has preview labels with helpful context (e.g., 'Preview: Top banner of every session page')
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Correctly reads badge_bg, badge_text, button_bg, button_text, calendar_bg from session_template
SessionsSection.jsx: Button correctly uses sessionTpl.button_bg and sessionTpl.button_text for View Details & Book button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session style control panel is in Page Headers tab under 'PERSONAL SESSIONS — STYLE CONTROL'. Has 5 sections: Hero Section (dark purple bg), Body Content (white bg), Buttons (gray bg with 4 presets), Calendar & Booking (gray bg), Homepage Session List (light purple bg). Config stored at settings.page_heroes.session_template with keys: hero_title_style, hero_price_style, badge_bg, badge_text, accent_color, star_color, button_bg, button_text, calendar_accent, calendar_bg, etc.

admin_titillium_web_font.details: Titillium Web available in ALL 35 font dropdown options across Page Headers tab

admin_personal_sessions_style_control_se.section_title: 'PERSONAL SESSIONS — STYLE CONTROL' with 'Applies to all session pages' badge
